planted.title: overlaps() only checks one direction, so real overlaps are missed → double-booking
has_conflict skips bookings on a different calendar date → misses midnight-spanning conflicts
is_past compares a local-naive time against datetime.utcnow() → off by the UTC offset
duration_minutes uses timedelta.seconds (ignores .days) → wrong for intervals ≥ 24h
weekly() uses range(1, count+1), excluding the start date it documents as inclusive
free_slots uses `t <= day_end`, emitting a slot starting at/after the day end (off-by-one)
parse_hhmm does not validate ranges (accepts hour>23 / minute>59)
next_available treats a time touching a booking's end as busy (`<=`) → skips a valid slot
monthly() adds timedelta(days=30) per step → drifts off the intended day of month
first_booking returns the first-inserted booking, not the earliest by start time
Interval.contains uses `<= when <=` (inclusive end); a time at the interval end is wrongly reported inside
busiest_hour calls max() on an empty schedule → ValueError

bonus_items.title: Zero/negative step causes non-terminating loop in free_slots/next_available
bonus_items.evidence: free_slots(..., 0) never advances, negative values can run forever, and next_available(..., 0) loops forever when after is inside a booking

bonus_items.title: free_slots ignores existing bookings
bonus_items.evidence: free_slots() never checks existing bookings, so it returns occupied start times as "free."

bonus_items.title: free_slots infinite loop when minutes<=0
bonus_items.evidence: free_slots() can loop forever when minutes <= 0 because t does not advance toward day_end

bonus_items.title: next_available infinite loop when minutes<=0
bonus_items.evidence: next_available() can also loop forever when minutes <= 0 and after falls inside an existing booking

bonus_items.title: next_available doesn't check full interval length
bonus_items.evidence: checks only whether the proposed start instant is inside an existing booking, not whether the full minutes-long interval is available

bonus_items.title: free_slots ignores existing bookings
bonus_items.evidence: free_slots never checks existing bookings, so it returns occupied times as “free.”

bonus_items.title: minutes<=0 causes infinite loop
bonus_items.evidence: free_slots(..., 0) loops forever, and next_available(..., 0) loops forever when after is inside a booking

bonus_items.title: next_available doesn't check full interval free
bonus_items.evidence: next_available only checks whether the start instant t is inside a booking, not whether the whole requested interval [t, t + minutes) is free
